selection_basis.ledger_reason: This was the next strong active sibling after the A1 judgment reduction and before the remaining entropy support packs.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the active A1 entropy control family into a smaller controller-usable fence set without rereading raw A1 sources or promoting A1 control language into lower-loop law.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest work-surface follow-on if the queue returns to export revision archaeology next.
Strongest adjacent active sibling once the first entropy-control family is narrowed.
Strongest later work-surface packet after the bootstrap ladder completion pass.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate the executable floor, branch-budget/path-build steering, helper-decomposition blocker, colder-witness control, and rescue/bottleneck tensions needed for this bounded reduction.

candidate_items.name: CORRELATION_POLARITY_IS_HONEST_EXECUTABLE_ENTROPY_HEAD
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent packet's most important executable-floor honesty rule without overpromoting the broader bridge layer.

candidate_items.name: BRANCH_BUDGET_AND_PATH_BUILD_CLAMP_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the live broad-route steering move into one reusable packet.

candidate_items.name: HELPER_DECOMPOSITION_BLOCKS_DIRECT_BRIDGE_HEAD_PROMOTION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the parent packet's sharpest live blocker explicit and reusable.

candidate_items.name: COLDER_WITNESS_COMPOSITION_WITH_NO_LONE_HELPERS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the anti-helper-drift composition rule while keeping standalone colder routes fenced.

candidate_items.name: CLUSTER_RESCUE_ORDER_IS_CONTROLLER_CHOICE_NOT_HISTOGRAM_ECHO
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the rescue-order control choice without erasing the topology map.

candidate_items.name: BOTTLENECK_HISTORY_ENDS_AT_HELPER_DECOMPOSITION_AND_FUNCTIONAL_RESCUE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the moving blocker history and nonclosure discipline explicit instead of turning route progress into closure.

quarantined_items.name: RICHER_BRIDGE_SUPPORT_OR_ROUTE_SURVIVAL_AS_EXECUTABLE_LANDING
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent repeatedly distinguishes executable correlation-side honesty from broader bridge support and rescue improvement.

quarantined_items.name: CONTROL_PACK_ACCUMULATION_OR_WRAPPER_PARAPHRASE_AS_NEW_ONTOLOGY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent preserves wrapper-severity differences and explicitly says the family steers an existing lane rather than creating new kernel truth.

notes: This batch preserves active A1 entropy control as a proposal-only controller fence set rather than lower-loop truth.
No raw source reread and no active append-save were performed.
